case_title: ESTEBAN MAYORGA VS. SHAWN CHRISTOPHER JIMENEZ et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-12-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-01-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-01-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST SCOTT DUNNING FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-12-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-27-2002. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYORGA, ESTEBAN AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, SHAWN CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-13-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-15-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-27-2002

ARBITRATOR HERMAN DAVID PAPA APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FEB-24-2003 THROUGH MAY-25-2003.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS; COMPLAINT; NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF; ADR INFORMATION PACKAGE: FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYORGA, ESTEBAN SERVED NOV-09-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, SHAWN CHRISTOPHER

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-24-2003. JAN-29-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
